//: Copy the entries below into your Claude Desktop config's mcpServers block.
//note: Replace ABSOLUTE_REPO_PATH with the full path to this repo, and use the venv's python so the servers see their dependencies.
//vault: The 'vault' server is the personal-knowledge RAG (capture / search_vault / get_note / timeline). VAULT_DIR defaults to ABSOLUTE_REPO_PATH/vault; set it to wherever you want your Markdown vault to live.
